questions.question: What Nevada locale was stuck with the CB radio term 'Split City'?
What Steppenwolf hit was the first rock song to use the term 'heavy metal'?
What spaceman did a 17-member Ohio Congressional delegation ask General Mills to picture on boxes of Wheaties, in 1998?
What cross-dressing reptile has a tongue as long as its body?
What baseball venue's turf caused Dick Allen to warn, 'If cows don't eat it, I ain't playing on it'?
What classic Bugs Bunny cartoon retold the story of Little Red Riding Hood?
